Nutrition • Recipes • Reset Meals

Carnivore & Keto Recipes

Simple meals built for carnivore, keto, and low-carb lifestyles — focused on protein, satiety, energy, and consistency.

Start 7-Day Reset Track Today
Metabo Nutrition
Fuel better. Recover better. Perform better.

Simple carnivore meals

Minimal ingredients. Maximum nutrition.

Ribeye Steak

Salted ribeye cooked in butter or tallow. One of the most nutrient dense carnivore meals.

Watch recipe

Ground Beef Bowl

Ground beef cooked with salt and butter. Optional eggs on top.

Watch recipe

Egg & Steak Plate

Steak with fried eggs cooked in butter. A classic carnivore meal.

Watch recipe

Keto friendly meals

Low carbohydrate meals designed for stable energy.

Salmon & Butter

Wild salmon cooked in butter with sea salt. High omega-3 fats.

Watch recipe

Chicken Thighs

Pan roasted chicken thighs with crispy skin. High fat and very satisfying.

Watch recipe

Beef & Eggs Skillet

Ground beef and eggs cooked together in a skillet. Fast, cheap, and nutrient dense.

Watch recipe
